summary: Secure workflow automation platform for technical teams with 400+ integrations and native AI capabilities.
description: n8n is a fair-code workflow automation platform that combines the flexibility of code with the speed of no-code. It enables technical teams to build powerful automations, AI agent workflows based on LangChain, and integrate with 400+ services while maintaining full control over data and deployments. Features enterprise-grade security, SSO, and self-hosting capabilities.

port.description: The port n8n listens on for HTTP/HTTPS traffic.

ct-callback-url.description: Control Tower engine callback URL for deployment status and health checks.

ct-snap-name.description: Control Tower engine snap identifier for this deployment.

ct-node-id.description: Unique identifier for the node within the Control Tower cluster.

ct-deployment-id.description: Control Tower deployment identifier for tracking and management.
